prompt: Four coworkers (Priya, Jo, Sam, and Wei) need to each give a 15-minute presentation back-to-back in a single 1-hour meeting starting at 2:00 PM, with no gaps or breaks between talks. Priya must present before Jo. Wei must present last. Sam must present first. List one valid ordering with start times for each presenter.
rubric: Award full credit for any ordering where Sam is first, Wei is last, Priya comes before Jo, and the four 15-minute slots correctly tile 2:00-3:00 PM with no gaps (the only valid ordering is Sam, Priya, Jo, Wei). Partial credit if the ordering/constraints are right but times are miscalculated. No credit if any constraint (Sam first, Wei last, Priya before Jo) is violated.
